what_it_grounded: pest_control + fertilizer + crop_management + variety_selection + irrigation + livestock_advisory + post_harvest

source: Manually crafted L5 high-stakes dilemma rows — Expert synthesis. 8 rows: drought + irrigation dilemma, cyclone + harvest timing, KCC loan + crop failure, flood + crop choice, monsoon delay + sowing, borewell failure + sugarcane, mental health + debt, organic certification + pest pressure.
L3 fine-grained multi-variable synthesis rows — 8 rows. Each synthesizes soil type + growth stage + crop + region + season. Generated via OpenRouter llama-3.3-70b-instruct grounded in TNAU knowledge.

L4 symptom diagnosis rows — 8 rows. Farmer describes symptoms only; answer diagnoses by name + treatment. Covers: blast/iron deficiency/pink bollworm/Panama wilt/thrips/leaf curl virus/root wilt/fall armyworm.

Negative space rows — 5 rows where correct answer is NOT to act. Covers: paddy yellowing (wait), prophylactic fungicide (don't spray), single wilted tomato (remove only), pre-rain irrigation (wait), minor flower drop (wait).

Contrastive pair rows — 6 rows (3 pairs). Same topic, different context = different outcome. Covers: rice blast at tillering vs neck stage; groundnut dry spell at vegetative vs germination; cotton PMFBY enrolled vs not enrolled.
